item.title: DCB Bank Joins Mojo Stocks List Following Robust Q4 Financials
item.description: DCB Bank has been added to the esteemed Mojo Stocks list as of 6 May 2026, reflecting its robust financial performance and improving market sentiment. The private sector bank, classified as a small-cap, has demonstrated significant growth across key metrics in the March 2026 quarter, prompting a bullish upgrade and positioning it as a compelling investment opportunity within the banking sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Sangam India Joins Reliable Performers List Following Strong Q4 Financials
item.description: Sangam India, a small-cap player in the garments and apparels sector, has been added to the esteemed Reliable Performers list as of 6 May 2026, following a robust quarterly financial performance that signals sustained growth and operational strength. The stock’s recent bullish momentum and record-breaking quarterly metrics underpin its selection, making it a compelling addition for investors seeking consistent fundamental growth. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Q4 FY26: Sharp Profit Decline Raises Sustainability Concerns
item.description: PNGS Gargi Fashion Jewellery Ltd., a micro-cap player in India's gems and jewellery sector with a market capitalisation of ₹1,005 crores, reported a concerning Q4 FY26 performance that has sent its shares tumbling. Net profit for the March 2026 quarter stood at ₹5.14 crores, representing a sharp decline of 51.51% quarter-on-quarter and 25.06% year-on-year, marking a significant reversal from the company's previously strong growth trajectory. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Unipro Technologies Q4 FY26: Revenue Drought Continues as Losses Mount
item.description: Unipro Technologies Ltd., a micro-cap IT software services provider, reported another troubling quarter in Q4 FY26, posting a net loss of ₹0.12 crores whilst continuing to register zero revenue for yet another consecutive quarter. The Hyderabad-based company, with a market capitalisation of just ₹15.00 crores, saw its stock decline 5.00% to ₹23.75 following the results announcement, extending a brutal one-month slide of 27.35% that has erased investor confidence. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Firstsource Solutions Q4 FY26: Strong Finish Masks Underlying Margin Pressures
item.description: Firstsource Solutions Ltd., a leading business process management provider within the RP-Sanjiv Goenka Group, delivered a robust fourth quarter performance for FY26, posting net profit of ₹205.24 crores—a remarkable 70.56% sequential jump and 27.72% year-on-year growth. However, the stock's dramatic 11.30% surge on May 06, 2026 to ₹243.35 came after months of sustained underperformance, with shares still down 23.35% over the past year and trading 39.74% below their 52-week high of ₹403.80. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: South Indian Bank Q4 FY26: Asset Quality Turnaround Drives 19% Profit Surge
item.description: South Indian Bank Ltd., one of Kerala's oldest private sector banks, delivered a strong finish to FY26 with net profit surging 19.09% year-on-year to ₹407.50 crores in Q4 FY26, marking the bank's highest quarterly profit on record. The Thrissur-based lender, with a market capitalisation of ₹10,811 crores, saw its stock rally 3.81% to ₹42.51 following the results announcement, reflecting investor confidence in the bank's asset quality transformation and improving operational metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Radico Khaitan Q4 FY25: Premium Valuation Meets Stellar Growth – But Is It Sustainable?
item.description: Radico Khaitan Ltd., one of India's oldest and largest manufacturers of Indian Made Foreign Liquor, delivered an exceptional fourth-quarter performance for FY25, with consolidated net profit surging 94.92% year-on-year to ₹179.46 crores in Q4 FY25 from ₹92.07 crores in Q4 FY24. The stellar results propelled the stock to trade at ₹3,358.45 on May 06, 2026, delivering a remarkable 32.86% return over the past year and outperforming the Sensex by a staggering 36.19 percentage points. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: CG Power Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd., the heavy electrical equipment manufacturer, delivered a blockbuster fourth quarter for FY26, posting consolidated net profit of ₹365.49 crores—a remarkable 34.39% surge year-on-year and 28.32% sequential growth. The ₹127,782 crore market capitalisation company's shares edged up 0.30% following the results, trading at ₹829.95 as investors digested the impressive earnings alongside stretched valuation multiples. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Rane (Madras) Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Surge Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Rane (Madras) Ltd., a Chennai-based auto components manufacturer with a market capitalisation of ₹2,371 crores, delivered an impressive fourth-quarter performance for FY26, posting a consolidated net profit of ₹36.96 crores—a remarkable 466.87% surge year-on-year from ₹6.52 crores in Q4 FY25. The stock responded enthusiastically, surging 6.05% to ₹914.40 in post-result trading, though it remains 13.29% below its 52-week high of ₹1,054.55. However, beneath the headline-grabbing profit numbers lie questions about sustainability, valuation premium, and the company's ability to maintain momentum in an increasingly competitive auto components landscape. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Garware Hi Tech Films Q4 FY26: Stellar Quarter Propels Stock 70% Higher, But Valuation Concerns Persist
item.description: Garware Hi Tech Films Ltd., a leading manufacturer of polyester films in India, delivered a blockbuster fourth quarter for FY2026, with net profit surging 94.03% quarter-on-quarter to ₹108.21 crores and revenues climbing 30.07% sequentially to ₹596.69 crores. The impressive results triggered a dramatic market response, with shares skyrocketing 12.80% to ₹5,038.60 on May 6, 2026, extending the stock's remarkable one-year rally to 70.26% and pushing the company's market capitalisation to ₹10,616 crores. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Capillary Technologies Q4 FY26: Stellar Turnaround Masks Valuation Concerns
item.description: Capillary Technologies India Limited, a small-cap software consulting firm, delivered a remarkable turnaround in Q4 FY26 (January to March 2026), posting consolidated net profit of ₹43.36 crores—a staggering 442.68% quarter-on-quarter surge and 322.61% year-on-year leap. The stock responded enthusiastically, rallying 4.44% to ₹566.25 on May 06, 2026, though it remains 29% below its 52-week high of ₹799. With a market capitalisation of ₹4,419 crores, the company now trades at a demanding valuation of 113 times trailing earnings, raising questions about sustainability despite the impressive quarterly performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: KPIT Technologies Q4 FY26: Profit Plunge Masks Revenue Growth as Margins Compress
item.description: KPIT Technologies Ltd., the Pune-based automotive software specialist, reported a 33.38% year-on-year decline in consolidated net profit to ₹163.05 crores for Q4 FY26, despite posting its highest-ever quarterly revenue of ₹1,711.00 crores. The stock plummeted 47.77% from its 52-week high of ₹1,433.00, closing at ₹748.45 on May 6, 2026, as investors grappled with deteriorating profitability metrics and mounting cost pressures. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Saj Hotels Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Saj Hotels Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show a decline in net profit to ₹0.85 crores and a year-on-year revenue contraction of 1.48%, despite improved operating margins. The significant rise in interest costs and low returns on equity and capital employed indicate ongoing financial challenges, leading to cautious investor sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Aadhar Housing Finance Ltd's latest results are strong, with a record net profit of ₹310.92 crores and significant revenue growth; however, concerns about declining promoter holding and lack of transparency on asset quality may impact investor sentiment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are GNG Electronics Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: GNG Electronics Ltd's latest results are strong, with a net profit increase of 185.76% and revenue growth of 42.98% year-on-year. However, profitability margins have contracted, and rising interest costs raise concerns about sustainability, indicating a mix of growth potential and financial challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong revenue growth of 16.70% year-on-year and a net profit increase of 28.81%, but face challenges with margin contraction and rising interest costs, indicating a mixed overall performance. Investors should monitor these factors closely as they may impact future profitability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: The latest results for Shipping Corporation of India Land & Assets Ltd show modest revenue growth but significant operational challenges, including a net loss of ₹0.84 crores and a troubling operating margin of -349.57%, indicating ongoing struggles with profitability and asset management. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Pelatro Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Pelatro Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 58.75% year-on-year, but declining operating margins and reliance on other income raise concerns about the sustainability of profitability. Overall, while the company has improved its balance sheet, investors should be cautious due to ongoing operational challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Exxaro Tiles Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Exxaro Tiles Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 40.49% to ₹99.90 crores, but a significant net profit decline of 68.25% to ₹0.20 crores indicates serious operational challenges and margin compression. Overall, the financial performance raises concerns about profitability and cost management despite the revenue increase. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Aeroflex Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Aeroflex Industries Ltd's latest results are strong, with a 57.08% increase in net profit and a 37.25% rise in revenue year-on-year, alongside improved operating and net profit margins. However, the company's high valuation compared to peers may pose challenges for investors. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
item.description: {{list.post_excerpt}} Time: {{list.post_date_sep}}
